metadata.name: Safely Limited Speed (SLS) for Inching Mode
metadata.description: Electrical schematic implementing a Safely Limited Speed (SLS) function in inching mode using a safety PLC, redundant guard switches, and dual encoder feedback. Category 3 / PL d according to EN ISO 13849-1.

elements.name: B1 Guard switch channel 1
elements.description: First safety guard switch contact with mechanical contact guidance, providing one input channel to the Safety PLC.

elements.name: B2 Guard switch channel 2
elements.description: Second safety guard switch contact with mechanical contact guidance, providing redundant input to the Safety PLC.

elements.name: S1 Inching pushbutton
elements.description: Pushbutton used to enable manual inching mode under safely limited speed conditions.

elements.name: K1 Safety PLC
elements.description: Safety PLC executing SLS logic: compares desired/actual speeds (n_desired, n_actual1, n_actual2), monitors guard and inching inputs, and controls inverter enable/disable outputs.

elements.name: Q1 Contactor
elements.description: Main contactor controlled by Safety PLC output to enable power to the inverter during inching mode.

elements.name: T1 Frequency inverter
elements.description: Frequency inverter with inputs for Start/Stop, Pulse blocking, and speed feedback signals; supervised by the Safety PLC for safe limited speed function.

elements.name: M1 3~
elements.description: Three-phase motor driven by frequency inverter, operating in safely limited speed (SLS) mode during inching operation.

elements.name: G1 Encoder channel 1 (n1_actual)
elements.description: First encoder providing actual speed feedback (n1_actual) to the Safety PLC for SLS monitoring.

elements.name: G2 Encoder channel 2 (n2_actual)
elements.description: Second redundant encoder providing independent speed feedback (n2_actual) to the Safety PLC for comparison and diagnostic coverage.

elements.name: L
elements.description: Three-phase mains supply providing power to the inverter and motor circuit.

elements.name: +Ub
elements.description: 24V DC control voltage for the Safety PLC, contactor, and sensors.
